basics.description:
## Pulser for Odoo — Finance Operations Control Tower

Deploys a complete **InsightPulse AI** platform stamp on Azure Container Apps: Odoo CE 18 ERP, Pulser AI copilot, PostgreSQL Flexible Server, Key Vault, Log Analytics, and Azure AI Services.

**Prerequisites**: An Azure subscription with Contributor role, and an Azure AI Foundry project (`ipai-copilot-resource`) if enabling Pulser AI.

**Estimated deployment time**: 15–25 minutes.

validations.message: The selected subscription does not have permission to create role assignments. Managed Identity federation requires this permission.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for all platform resources. Southeast Asia is the recommended primary region.

elements.name: odooAdminEmail
elements.label: Odoo Administrator Email
elements.toolTip: Email address for the initial Odoo administrator account. Must be a valid email address.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid email address.

elements.name: odooDatabaseName
elements.label: Odoo Database Name
elements.toolTip: PostgreSQL database name for the Odoo instance. Use lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.

constraints.validationMessage: Must start with a lowercase letter and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (max 63 characters).

elements.name: postgresAdminPassword
elements.toolTip: Password for the PostgreSQL administrator account. Must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, digits, and special characters. Stored in Azure Key Vault — never in config files.

constraints.validationMessage: Password must be 12–128 characters and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and one special character.

elements.name: postgresSku
elements.label: PostgreSQL Compute SKU
elements.toolTip: Compute SKU for PostgreSQL Flexible Server. D2s_v3 suits development and small production deployments. D4s_v3 is recommended for production workloads with 10+ concurrent users.

elements.name: enablePulserAI
elements.label: Enable Pulser AI copilot
elements.toolTip: Deploy the Pulser AI copilot overlay for Odoo Finance Operations. Requires an Azure AI Foundry project. Additional inference costs apply based on token consumption.

elements.name: foundryResourceName
elements.label: Azure AI Foundry Resource Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the existing Azure AI Foundry (AIServices) resource. This resource must already exist in your subscription — it is referenced, not created, by this deployment.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3–63 characters: letters, digits, and hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.

elements.name: enableDatabricks
elements.label: Enable Azure Databricks (Unity Catalog)
elements.toolTip: Deploy an Azure Databricks workspace with Unity Catalog for the governed data transformation and serving plane. This adds significant cost — recommended for production environments only.

options.text: Azure Databricks incurs significant compute and DBU costs. Ensure your subscription quota supports Databricks in the selected region before proceeding.

elements.name: enablePrivateEndpoints
elements.label: Enable private endpoints
elements.toolTip: Create Azure Private Endpoints for PostgreSQL and Key Vault, placing them on a private VNet. Recommended for production. Requires additional VNet address space.

options.text: Private endpoints will be provisioned in a new VNet (10.0.0.0/16). The ACA environment, PostgreSQL, and Key Vault will only be reachable within the VNet or via VPN/ExpressRoute.

elements.name: customDomain
elements.label: Custom Domain (optional)
elements.toolTip: Fully-qualified custom domain to bind to the Odoo Container App (e.g. erp.contoso.com). Leave blank to use the default ACA FQDN. You must own the domain and add a CNAME record pointing to the ACA ingress after deployment.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid fully-qualified domain name (e.g. erp.contoso.com) or left blank.

elements.name: environmentTag
elements.label: Environment
elements.toolTip: Deployment environment tier. Applied as the 'Environment' tag on all resource groups and resources, and controls default SKU and redundancy settings.

elements.name: organizationName
elements.label: Organization Name
elements.toolTip: Your organization or company name. Applied as the 'Organization' tag on all resources and used as the Odoo company name during initialization.

constraints.validationMessage: Organization name must be between 2 and 100 characters.

options.text: All resources will be tagged with: Environment, Organization, Platform=InsightPulseAI, ManagedBy=Bicep.
